policy.nonprivate: strictly cheaper, known100 dual, two independent fresh seeds each >=90%, runtime0, checker full, strict/data_prop, truthful shapes, standard domains, no lookup/cloak/giant, Conv-bias UB0
policy.private_risk: same gates but known/fresh must be 100% dual and the model must be demonstrably SOUND
policy.fail_closed: known/fresh candidate testing is not run when cost, checker, or structural prerequisites fail
